member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.AndroidAutofillService
member.summary: Placeholder for when Android-specific code is not being compiled.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.AutofillSuggestionProvider
member.summary: Provides credential suggestions for autofill based on domain matching and relevance scoring.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.AutofillSuggestionProvider.GetSuggestionsForDomainAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets credential suggestions for a given domain/URL. Returns credentials ordered by relevance (exact match > subdomain > similar domain).

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.AutofillSuggestionProvider.GetSuggestionsForUsernameAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets suggestions for username/email fields based on the current input value.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.CredentialSuggestion
member.summary: A credential suggestion with relevance scoring.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.MatchType
member.summary: Type of domain match.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldDetector
member.summary: Detects and classifies form input fields based on HTML attributes, labels, and patterns. Identifies email, username, password, confirmation password, passkey, and 2FA fields.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldDetector.DetectFieldType(PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldInfo)
member.summary: Detects the type of a form field based on its attributes.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldDetector.DetectLoginForm(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldInfo})
member.summary: Detects all login-related fields in a form.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldInfo
member.summary: Information about a detected form field.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.BoundingBox
member.summary: Bounding box coordinates for positioning the autofill UI.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormFieldType
member.summary: Type of form field detected.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormType
member.summary: Type of form detected.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.LoginFormDetectionResult
member.summary: Result of login form detection.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillProvider
member.summary: Abstraction for platform‑specific auto‑fill providers. Each platform (Windows/macOS, Android, iOS) should implement this interface to integrate with the operating system's password auto‑completion framework. Implementations should respect user preferences from the manifest (auto‑fill enabled, username vs password injection, domain whitelist).

member.name: P:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillProvider.IsSupported
member.summary: Determines whether the provider is supported on the current platform and properly configured. Should return false if necessary permissions are missing or if auto‑fill cannot be offered.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillProvider.TryFill(System.String)
member.summary: Initiates an auto‑fill operation for the specified domain. Implementations should query the vault for matching credentials and then inject the username and/or password according to user preferences. The method returns true if credentials were filled, false otherwise.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillVaultContext
member.summary: Provides the current vault state for autofill operations so the native messaging host can fail closed when the vault is locked or autofill is disabled in the manifest.

member.name: P:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillVaultContext.IsUnlocked
member.summary: True when the vault master key is loaded and the vault is unlocked.

member.name: P:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.IAutofillVaultContext.CurrentManifest
member.summary: The active vault manifest, or null if no vault is loaded.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository
member.summary: Interface for credential storage and retrieval. Implementations should handle encrypted storage of credentials.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository.GetCredentialsByDomainAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves credentials matching the specified domain.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository.SaveCredentialAsync(PhantomVault.Core.Models.Credential,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves a credential to the repository.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository.UpdateCredentialAsync(PhantomVault.Core.Models.Credential,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing credential.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository.DeleteCredentialAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a credential from the repository.
member.param: The title/ID of the credential to delete

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.ICredentialRepository.GetAllCredentialsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all stored credentials.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.INativeMessagingHost
member.summary: Interface for native messaging host that communicates with browser extensions. Implements the Chrome/Firefox native messaging protocol (stdin/stdout JSON messages). See: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/concepts/native-messaging

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.INativeMessagingHost.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the native messaging host, listening for messages on stdin. Runs until the browser extension disconnects or an error occurs.
member.param: Token to cancel the listening loop.

member.name: P:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.INativeMessagingHost.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the native messaging host is currently running.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.INativeMessagingHost.ValidateOrigin(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a message origin is from an allowed browser extension. Returns true if the origin is in the allowlist, false otherwise.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.InMemoryCredentialRepository
member.summary: In-memory credential repository for testing and development. WARNING: This is NOT persistent and NOT encrypted. For production, use a KeePass-based or encrypted database implementation.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.NativeMessagingHostService
member.summary:
Native messaging host implementation for browser extension communication. Implements the Chrome/Firefox native messaging protocol: - Reads 4-byte message length (little-endian) from stdin - Reads JSON message body of specified length - Writes 4-byte response length + JSON response to stdout
Security: - Validates extension origins against allowlist - Never logs credentials - Validates message structure before processing

member.name: E:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.NativeMessagingHostService.FormDetected
member.summary: Event raised when a form is detected on a webpage.

member.name: E:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.NativeMessagingHostService.FormSubmitted
member.summary: Event raised when a form is submitted (for password capture).

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.NativeMessagingHostService.NativeMessage
member.summary: Native messaging message format

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormDetectedEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for form detection.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.FormSubmittedEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for form submission.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService
member.summary: Captures new passwords during registration/login and prompts to save or update vault entries. Detects password changes and offers to update existing credentials.

member.name: E:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService.PasswordCaptured
member.summary: Event raised when a new password is detected and ready to be saved.

member.name: E:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService.PasswordChanged
member.summary: Event raised when a password change is detected for an existing credential.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService.DetectPasswordSubmissionAsync(System.String,PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.LoginFormDetectionResult,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Detects and captures password submission from a login/registration form.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService.SaveCapturedPasswordAsync(PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureEventArgs,System.String)
member.summary: Saves a captured password to the vault.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureService.UpdateCredentialPasswordAsync(PhantomVault.Core.Models.Credential,System.String)
member.summary: Updates an existing credential with a new password.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordCaptureEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for password capture.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.PasswordChangeEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for password change detection.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.CaptureType
member.summary: Type of password capture.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.WindowsAutofillService
member.summary: Windows desktop autofill provider. Works in conjunction with the browser extension and native messaging host. Does not implement OS-level autofill (Windows Credential Manager) - instead provides backend support for browser-based autofill via extension.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.WindowsAutofillService.TryFill(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to fill credentials for the specified domain. On Windows desktop, autofill is primarily handled by the browser extension communicating with the native messaging host. This method is provided for programmatic access but browser-based autofill is the recommended approach.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.WindowsAutofillService.StartNativeMessagingHostAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the native messaging host if available. This allows the browser extension to communicate with PhantomVault.

member.name: P:PhantomVault.Core.Services.Autofill.WindowsAutofillService.IsNativeMessagingHostRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the native messaging host is currently running.
